Proposed claim: The present gated-ICCD folders exhibit substantial differences in operational repeated-frame noise statistics.
Internal evidence: E1 mean/temporal/Fano/stable-component robustness; spatial PSD/autocorrelation; E6 drift and correlation audit
Literature evidence: Sandel & Broadfoot 1986; Williams & Shaddix 2007; Pelaez et al. 2012; Wang et al. 2026
Statistical strength: Ranges exceed median crop/frame sensitivity across ten folders
Main limitation: Folder/scene identity is confounded; no matched dark/flat; stable component is not uniquely FPN

Proposed claim: The unified synthetic priors tested in this study did not transfer reliably to the present real-surrogate task.
Internal evidence: E5 four cells all negative; three seeds; two references; prior gate gain below seed variability
Literature evidence: Plotz & Roth 2017; Zhang et al. 2021; Han et al. 2021; Luo et al. 2025
Main limitation: Applies only to tested priors, small CNN, data batch, and surrogate references

Proposed claim: Within the frozen E5 protocol, larger residual-strength mismatch is associated with poorer folder-level surrogate transfer.
Internal evidence: E8 exact block permutation; LOO; seed/reference sensitivity; gradient partial rank; negative control; bootstrap
Literature evidence: Plotz & Roth 2017 and Zhang et al. 2021 support transfer-based simulator validation; no direct ICCD equivalent identified
Statistical strength: Mean rho -0.6061; p=0.00293; LOO 10/10 negative; seed/reference 6/6 negative; partial rho -0.5077
Main limitation: Narrow C1: n=10; bootstrap [-0.500,0.000]; H-L rho -0.2485; observational and device-specific

Proposed claim: The current radial-PSD mismatch metric did not show the preregistered negative association with transfer.
Internal evidence: E8 spatial metric reliability and association outputs
Literature evidence: Zhang et al. 2021; Fu et al. 2023 provide counter-evidence that spatial/local correlation can matter
Statistical strength: Mean rho +0.3455; p=0.1890; only 1/4 variant negative
Main limitation: Metric-specific null; cannot infer spatial structure is unimportant

Proposed claim: Higher synthetic residual strength increased oversmoothing risk in the fixed small-CNN probe.
Internal evidence: E5 gradient/noisy ratios, negative PSNR transfer, residual and error panels
Literature evidence: Han et al. 2021 reports mismatch-related degradation in ICMOS; general real-denoising literature motivates edge-preservation audit
Statistical strength: High cells gradient ratios 0.3515/0.4009 versus low cells 0.5697/0.5305
Main limitation: Small CNN only; gradient ratio is an operational oversmoothing indicator, not recovered-detail ground truth

Proposed claim: The present ten-folder dataset does not satisfy a universal naive Noise2Noise repeated-frame protocol.
Internal evidence: E6 only 2/10 folders pass; pixel/bin/row/column correlations, drift, stable maps; low high-frequency correlation
Literature evidence: Lehtinen et al. 2018; Batson & Royer 2019; Lee et al. 2022; Jang et al. 2023
Main limitation: Does not apply to all ICCD data; high-frequency/local self-supervision remains untested

Proposed claim: The exploratory gate/blend gives a stable deployable condition policy.
Internal evidence: E4 advantage about 0.036 dB; E5 seed SD up to 0.668 dB; E7 condition score confounded
Literature evidence: Noise Flow 2019 shows validated conditioning requires actual condition labels and real noise data
Statistical strength: Effect is below seed variability and test folders informed earlier diagnostic rules
Main limitation: Exploratory only; no deployment or contribution claim

Proposed claim: The study identifies physical noise mechanisms, recovers true detail, predicts performance, or generalizes to other ICCDs.
Internal evidence: No supporting calibrated acquisition or independent device validation
Literature evidence: Direct ICCD calibration literature shows dark/flat, controlled flux, gain, ENF, uniformity, and response measurements are required
Main limitation: No clean ground truth, matched calibration, causal intervention, predictor validation, or external camera
